creator: ari@ish.com.au
text:
net-mgmt/zabbix2-server/pkg-plist has this line:

   %%JAVAGW%%%%ZABBIX_JAVA%%/bin/zabbix-java-gateway-2.0.4.jar

That should be instead

   %%JAVAGW%%%%ZABBIX_JAVA%%/bin/zabbix-java-gateway-2.0.8.jar


And of course this needs to be kept up to date in future releases.
